features: Oud 24 Majestic Gold is a stunning fragrance, with woody and citrus notes.
A great scent with a blend of earthy, boozy florals notes.
This EDP fragrance will lift your mood and confidence with its pleasent smell.
Oud 24 Majestic Gold is the best gift and will be perfect for every occasion- birthdays, anniversaries and for him and her.
This perfume is the perfect fragrance for men and women according to its scent and appearance.
description: Product description Oud 24 Majestic Gold 100ml EDP by Ard Al Zaafaran Fragrance Notes: Top Notes: Black Orchid, Ylang-Ylang Middle Notes: Plum, Agarwood Bottom Notes: Oud, Patchouli, Citrus Ingredients Alcohol denat,Parfum(Fragrance),water(Aqua),Benzyl salicylate,Lina cool, Limonene,Hyrdoxycitronellai,Gearniol,Citronellol,Hexyl cinnamal,Geraniol,Alpha Isomethyl Ionone,Citral,Coumarin,Benzyl alcohol,Farnesol, Directions Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For a 100ml EDP, a few spritzes should be enough. Reapply as needed for longevity. See more
